text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
My legs feel heavy, like I'm trudging through a
swamp all by myself.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
choice_data_list: Don't worry. We'll win the next one!
I want you to run your way.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: We... That's right. I'm not alone anymore.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Thank you. I'm... I'm counting on you.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I see... How can I win if I'm not running my own
way?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much. I'll run my way in the next
race.
